data.title: Advantech (TWSE: 2395) teams up with Edge Impulse to enhance Edge AI development, aiming for innovative solutions.
data.description: Taipei, Taiwan, on October 2, 2025 - Advantech, a prominent player in IoT intelligent systems and embedded platforms listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange as 2395, will be collaborating strategically with Edge Impulse Inc. This entity, a subsidiary of Qualcomm and a key provider of cutting-edge AI development platforms intended for edge AI applications, will be joining forces with Advantech as per recent announcements.

data.title: Bitcoin surpasses $121,000; Ethereum, Dogecoin, XRP also rise. Analytic firm predicts BTC hitting $130,000. Greed sentiment in market.
data.description: Cryptocurrencies and stocks surged despite government shutdown concerns. Bitcoin rose by +1.30% to $120,125.23, nearing its all-time high, while Ethereum climbed +2.55% to $4,468.61. XRP increased by +1.98% to $3.01, Solana jumped +4.82% to $231.39, and Dogecoin saw a +4.47% rise to $0.2590. Bitcoin's rally continued, nearing its all-time high with JPMorgan analysts raising their year-end target to $165,000. Ethereum hit $4,500 before settling at $4,700. Over $393 million in cryptocurrency liquidations occurred, with $274 million in bearish shorts extinguished. Bitcoin shorts worth $435 million were at risk if prices surged to $123,000. Bitcoin's open interest rose by 3.02%, indicating fresh capital inflow into derivatives markets. Greed sentiment prevailed in the crypto market.

data.title: Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq hit all-time highs. Tesla disappoints despite record deliveries.
data.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq have reached new record highs. Broadcom showed a buy signal amidst a surge in hot stocks. Tesla experienced a decline despite achieving record deliveries. Dow Jones Futures are on the rise following a rally in high-performing stocks.

data.title: Fanatics Collectibles and Kayou collaborate on NBA trading cards in China, distributing through NBA Match Attax 2025 to boost basketball passion.
data.description: In Shanghai today, Fanatics Collectibles, collaborating with Topps, and Kayou, have revealed a joint venture to introduce NBA trading cards to China through NBA Match Attax 2025. This partnership aims to make NBA trading cards easily available to basketball enthusiasts in China, thereby enhancing the nation's enthusiasm for the sport. In an unprecedented move, Kayou, a prominent trading card producer in China, will oversee the production and distribution of the cards, utilizing its extensive network for this purpose.

data.title: Xsolla and Nexstar's NewsNation partner to launch gaming vodcast series, focusing on gaming culture, business, and technology.
data.description: In a notable collaboration, Xsolla, a renowned video game commerce company, has revealed a significant content partnership with Nexstar Media Group, Inc., a prominent local television broadcaster and the owner of the cable news network NewsNation. This remarkable alliance will see the duo working together to create and circulate a co-branded vodcast series that centers around the gaming industry's culture, business landscape, and technological advancements. The vodcast episodes will be a joint effort from Xsolla and NewsNation and will delve into various aspects of the gaming world.

data.title: Trump Jr. criticizes media treatment, compares deplatforming to crypto debanking at a Singapore crypto conference.
data.description: During the biggest crypto conference in Singapore, Donald Trump Jr. made a statement about World Liberty Financial being a dual financial and media option. He criticized mainstream media, claiming they have undermined their credibility.
